goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'thai' food.
The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'postcode', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west and should be in the type of college
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve thai food
The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction
Make sure you get address, postcode, and phone number
